measurement_note: Size is N, the string length. Every character is z, so the first transform contributes 2 + 6 = 8 per character and returns 8N when k is 1. The reference combines conversion with that transform in one scan. A correct slower implementation rebuilds the complete converted decimal string for every growing prefix, uses the final prefix for the answer, performs Theta(N squared) character work, completes all legal tiers, and fails by scaling.
